name: @larva-db/core
description: A tiny SQL database that lives inside your Vercel Blob store. Real SQL, atomic transactions, time travel, and a guaranteed exit path when you outgrow it.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm --external '@vercel/blob' && bun build src/testing/index.ts --outfile dist/testing.js --target node --format esm --external '@vercel/blob' && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --format esm --external '@vercel/blob' --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node' && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
